summary: Tested personalized OG image generation for social share previews. All 13 backend tests passed. The /api/s/og-image/{user_id} endpoint generates a 1200x630 PNG image with the salesperson's photo, name, title, and store branding. Short URL redirects correctly include og:image meta tag pointing to this endpoint with proper dimensions.

minor.issue: Cache-Control header is overridden by proxy to 'no-store, no-cache' in preview environment. Backend code sets 'public, max-age=3600' but proxy overrides it. Not a code bug.

critical_code_review_comments: OG image endpoint at /api/s/og-image/{user_id} is correctly implemented using PIL/Pillow
Image dimensions are correct: 1200x630 (standard OG image size)
Fallback handling is correct: returns 404 for non-existent users instead of 500 error
Short URL redirect handler correctly includes og:image, og:image:width, og:image:height meta tags
og:title and og:description are dynamically generated based on user/store data
Code handles edge cases: user photos (circular crop), store logos, initials fallback
context_for_next_testing_agent: OG image personalization feature is fully tested. Test file test_og_image_personalization.py covers: OG image endpoint (200 status, PNG type, 1200x630 dimensions, >10KB content, fallback for missing users), Short URL OG meta tags (og:image, og:image:width, og:image:height, og:title, og:description), and integration test (og:image URL accessibility, image content validation).

sample_og_meta_tags.og:title: Forest Admin's Digital Card
sample_og_meta_tags.og:description: Connect with Forest Admin at i'M On social
